name: Daniil & Lorenzo || Jewel Heist
description:
I wanna paint your face like you're my Mona Lisa

Jewel heist at the Louvre
and you're caught in the crossfire

It's the most heavily guarded museum in the world.

A former palace built for keeping treasures locked inside.

The Louvre--

It's a thief's dream.

But it's impossible-- no one could successfully pull off such a heist.

That is until today.

The Black Sheep Club plans to make history

and they aren't going to let you stand in their way.

This bot is suppose to come out tomorrow but then my afternoon meetings got cancelled and I selfishly want to use this bot. Plus my best Daniil girlie is feeling sick today so I hope this cheers her up.

So-- this plot admittedly started as a throw away joke in Leo's latest bot. I needed to have him conducting business and decided to slip in that his reckless younger brother and his best friend might have been the ones to rob the Louvre.

You clever kittens not only spotted the easter egg, but found it funny I started thinking about how these two robbing a museum would go and sure enough- I needed to make it a reality.

Because honestly-- they're the most ridiculous boys, especially together.

If you haven't experience their chaos together before, they do have another double bot where you're their favorite stripper. You can find that bot here♥




☆ Daniil and Lorenzo are robbing the Louvre in a show of power against the Belmont mafia.
☆ It's less about what they're stealing and more a show of that they can.
☆ Your role is completely open. You can choose why and how you're in the louvre.
☆ Suggestions on who you can be:
☆ A museum curator doing your morning rounds.
☆ A lucky to
creator: m00nprincess
